steps.title: Spot the defining action
steps.content: The tides "reshape the deltaic lobes over time"—they actively modify the delta's shape and size.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The shape and size of the delta need to be ______ by the tides — the tides shift sediments and reshape the lobes, so the blank must mean "affected" or "modified." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘surpassed’: exceeded or outperformed — tides don't outperform the delta's shape, they change it. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘enhanced’: improved — the passage describes reshaping, not improvement. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘influenced’: affected or shaped by an external force — tides actively shift sediments and reshape the lobes, which is exactly this. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘protected’: shielded from harm — the tides reshape the delta, they don't protect it. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
